description: "The choice weapon of the infamous Darkwraith Kirk, also known as the Knight of Thorns for the gnarly spikes on his favorite weapon.""This frightful sword deals only thrust attacks, and causes heavy bleeding."
location: [1] - ‍Possible drop from Kirk, Knight of Thorns in any of his three encounters.‍.

description: The wide blade of this straight sword emphasizes slicing and has no thrust attack.""The horizontal sweeping motion makes this sword effective against multiple enemies."
location: [1] - Default equipment for the Knight class. [2] - Purchased from Andre of Astora (1,000 Souls).

description: Half of the blade of this straight sword is broken off.Only the completely Hollowed would even consider using this as a weapon."
location: [1] - Drops from Hollows (2% chance - Undead Burg, Northern Undead Asylum, Undead Parish, Depths, Northern Undead Asylum and Painted World of Ariamis). [2] - Drops from Torch Hollows (2% chance - Northern Undead Asylum, Lower Undead Burg, Depths and Painted World of Ariamis). [3] - Drops from sword-wielding Infested Ghouls (2% - Blighttown).

description: A fully crystallized straight sword. How such a weapon was created is entirely unknown.""The crystallization boosts its attack, but makes the blade brittle. The sword cannot be used for long, as it cannot be repaired."
location: [1] - Drops from Undead Crystal Soldiers (Sword) (3% chance - The Duke's Archives). [2] - Purchased from Domhnall of Zena (4,000 Souls).

description: The sword of the knights of the Four Kings of New Londo. Its blade is wide and thick and it is wielded in an unusual manner.""When the Four Kings were seduced by evil, their knights became Darkwraiths, servants of the Dark who wielded these darkswords."
location: [1] - Obtained by reaching Rank 2 in the Darkwraith Covenant.

description: This sword, one of the rare dragon weapons, is formed by a drake's tail. Drakes are seen as undeveloped imitators of the dragons, but they are likely their distant kin." "The sword is imbued with a mystical power, to be released when held with both hands."
location: NA

description: Widely-used standard straight sword, only matched in ubiquity by the shortsword." "An accessible sword which inflicts consistent regular damage and high slash damage, making it applicable to a variety of situations."
location: [1] - Default equipment for the Warrior class. [2] - Purchased from Andre of Astora (1,000 Souls). [3] - Drops from Undead Soldiers with Sword and Shield (2% drop chance - Undead Burg, Undead Parish, Northern Undead Asylum (Revisit), Firelink Shrine).

description: This small straight sword is widely used, to an extent only matched by the longsword." "An accessible sword which inflicts consistent regular damage and high slash damage, making it applicable to a variety of situations."
location: [1] - Default equipment for the Hunter class. [2] - Purchased from the Male Undead Merchant (600 Souls). [3] - Drops from sword-wielding Hollow Warriors.

description: The silver knights of Anor Londo guard the city using this beautifully slender weapon."Its chain attacks, in which the wielder takes great advancing steps and makes use of his bodyweight, are deadly even in single hits."
location: [1] - Drops from Silver Knights (Sword and Shield) (2% Chance - Anor Londo).

description: The hilt of this lost sword was found discarded in the Undead Asylum.""Only slightly better than one's bare hands, and not recommended for extensive use. Be certain to find a replacement quickly."
location: [1] - The weapon every newly created character starts with, equipped in right hand. [2] - Can only be obtained once per character, unless dropped by another player in co-op. It cannot be farmed, found on a corpse, or generated when starting a New Game plus.

description: This standard longsword, belonging to Solaire of Astora, is of high quality, is well-forged, and has been kept in good repair. Easy to use and dependable, but unlikely to live up to its grandiose name."
location: [1] - Obtained after killing Solaire of Astora during any of numerous encounters with him throughout Lordran. [2] - Video Location Timestamp 13:35.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. Canvas Talisman is for clerics on a pilgrimage. Equip talisman to cast miracles. Attune miracles from a scroll at a bonfire. Most miracles have limited number of uses."
location: [1] - Starting equipment for Cleric. [2] - Sold by Patches for 1,000 souls.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. Granted to Darkmoon Blade knights, adherents to the Covenant of the Dark Sun Gwyndolin. This talisman demands dutiful faith from its owner, but has very high miracle adjustment".
location: [1] - Obtained by giving 10 Souvenirs of Reprisal to Blade of the Dark Moon Covenant.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. Ivory Talismans are granted only to female clerics and their value is affected dramatically by their owner's faith."
location: [1] - Obtained by defeating Reah of Thorolund in The Duke's Archives after she hollows. [2] - Obtained by defeating Reah of Thorolund at Undead Parish church before she dies. [3] - Petrus will also drop the Ivory Talisman, but only after he has assassinated Reah of Thorolund.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. The talisman of Solaire of Astora, the Knight of Sunlight, is decorated with a holy symbol, illustrated by Solaire himself. This talisman is a projection of Solaire's upstanding, unwavering faith."
location: [1] - Dropped by Solaire of Astora. [2] - Video Location Timestamp 13:35.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. Standard talisman issued to common believers. Equip talisman to cast miracles. Attune miracles from a scroll at a bonfire. Most miracles have limited number of uses."
location: [1] - Found in chest at Firelink Shrine, below the elevator to Undead Parish. [2] - Sold by Petrus of Thorolund for 1,000 souls.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. This talisman is only granted to high-ranking Thorolund clerics. Has high miracle adjustment which, thanks to divine protection, is not dependent upon faith.
location: [1] - Sold by Petrus of Thorolund for 5,000 souls. [2] - Sold by Patches the Hyena for 5,000 souls.

description: Medium for casting miracles of the Gods. This black tuft of hair that serves as a talisman belongs to Velka, Goddess of Sin. It casts miracles not by drawing upon faith, but intelligence."
location: [1] - Sold by Oswald of Carim in the Undead Parish church bell tower for 5,000 souls.

description: Greatsword of the black knights who wander Lordran. Used to face chaos demons.""The large motion that puts the weight of the body into the attack reflects the great size of their adversaries long ago."
location: NA

description: The lesser Capra demons use these greatswords in pairs. The blade is cast iron and hooked." "The sword is imbued with no particular magic, but for those who have the strength, its great weight will smash foes mercilessly."
location: [1] - Rare drop from the Capra Demon boss. [2] - Drops from Minor Capra Demon (5% Chance - Demon Ruins). [3] - Purchased from Shiva of the East for 10,000 souls.

description: This sword, one of the rare dragon weapons, came from the tail of the stone dragon of Ash Lake, descendant of the ancient dragons." "Its great mystical power will be unleashed when wielded with two hands."
location: [1] - Obtained by cutting off the Everlasting Dragon's Tail in Ash Lake. [2] - Note: This will not make him hostile or break the Covenant. Tail does grow back, but cutting it second time doesn't give you the weapon anymore. Ancient Stone Dragon does not become hostile if you do so, or attack it in any other way. [3] - Video Location Timestamp 7:15.

description: One of the gigantic straight greatswords. Very few have what it takes to wield this incredibly heavy, damage-dealing monster.""A favorite of the Knights Berenike, known for their heavy armor, and Black iron Tarkus."
location: [1] - Sold by the Crestfallen Merchant in Sen's Fortress for 8,000 souls. [2] - Rarely drops from Berenike Knights, found in Undead Parish, Sen's Fortress, and the Painted World of Ariamis. [3] - In Anor Londo, found on a body to the left of the Painting of Ariamis.

description: One of the gigantic straight greatswords. As the name suggests, the Zweihander is held with two hands, but its wielder must still be inhumanly strong." "It is this great weight that sends foes flying when hit solidly."
location: NA

description: Sliced tail of the Sanctuary Guardian. This flexible, spiked and highly poisonous tail would make a rather obnoxious weapon.
location: [1] - Cutting off the Sanctuary Guardian's Tail (can also be obtained from one of the Lesser Sanctuary Guardians if missed). [2] - Best way to do so is to equip a weapon with a long reach and decent speed vertical slash, and bait the chimera to do its water splash attack by staying at medium range, GET HIT by it (it just staggers - no damage) prompting the boss to do his charge attack, roll to the right and cut once or twice.

description: Notched Whip with sharp spikes. Only slightly effective against armor and tough scales, but quite formidable against enemies with exposed skin. Also causes heavy bleeding.
location: [1] - Give to Frampt to receive 50 souls. [2] - Bleed build up is 33 per strike, and once inflicted will tear 30% of the opponents HP. [3] - Breaks 20 poise per swing.

description: Leather whip. Not intended for battle. Virtually ineffective against armor and tough scales, but quite formidable against enemies with exposed skin."
location: [1] - Blighttown upper area. On a small platform, near the top of the sewer-shaft that ends up behind the lower bonfire. [2] - Video Location Timestamp 9:25.
